description: Use this when you need to find code that implements a concept or pattern. This understands semantic meaning-searching for "authentication" will find login functions, JWT validation, password checking, etc. even if they don't contain the word "authentication". Perfect for exploring unfamiliar codebases or finding implementation patterns.

properties.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository
properties.name: repository_id

properties.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch
properties.name: branch

properties.description: Maximum number of results to return
properties.name: limit

repository_id.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository

branch.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

summary: Search code by meaning, not just text
